data.title: Limbach Holdings Inc to attend CJS Securities 26th Annual New Ideas for the New Year Conference. CEO and CFO to participate. (249 char)
data.description: Limbach Holdings, Inc., a company listed on Nasdaq under the ticker symbol LMB, which provides building systems solutions for critical mechanical, electrical, and plumbing infrastructure, shared news regarding the participation of its President and CEO, Michael McCann, and Executive Vice President and CFO, Jayme Brooks, in the CJS Securities 26th Annual New Ideas for the New Year conference. This event serves as a platform for industry leaders to present innovative ideas.

data.title: Jamf debuts #RetailRunsOniOS World Tour at NRF 2026, showcasing iOS Avenue at booth #5375 in NY, demonstrating iOS in-store operations.
data.description: In New York, Jamf (NASDAQ: JAMF) revealed the kickoff of its #RetailRunsOniOS World Tour, starting with iOS Avenue at NRF 2026: Retail's Big Show on January 11-13 at the Jacob K. Javits Convention Center. Booth #5375 will feature demonstrations by Jamf and partners showcasing how iOS drives contemporary in-store functions, creating secure links between staff and customers.

data.title: Acumatica appoints Jon Pollock as Chief Product Officer to drive cloud ERP innovation. Important role in overseeing product strategy and growth initiatives.
data.description: In Bellevue, Washington, Acumatica, a prominent cloud ERP provider, unveiled the appointment of Jon Pollock as their Chief Product Officer (CPO). As CPO, Pollock will helm Acumatica’s worldwide product management and user experience divisions, managing product strategy, innovation, and delivery throughout their cloud ERP platform. His responsibilities include propelling Acumatica’s product vision and AI innovation strategy, along with fostering growth initiatives. This move signifies Acumatica’s dedication to enhancing their offerings and advancing in the industry.

data.title: Chile's Enap selects Argus for crude oil pricing in long-term import deal with Argentina, effective from 2026.
data.description: Chilean state-owned oil company Enap has recently announced that they will be utilizing the prices provided by the global energy and commodity price reporting agency Argus for their long-term import agreement. This deal involves the purchase of crude oil from Argentina, with Enap opting to base their pricing decisions on Argus reports. This move signifies a strategic shift for Enap in sourcing their oil supplies and highlights their confidence in the pricing data provided by Argus. The specific numbers pertaining to the deal, such as the duration and volume of crude oil involved, have not been disclosed in the news piece.

data.title: Green Builder Media releases curated ebook library to aid building pros. Covers home performance, electrification, resilience.
data.description: Today, in Lake City, Colorado, Green Builder Media unveiled a new collection comprising a curated library of comprehensive ebooks and special reports. The purpose of these resources is to assist building professionals in managing the fast-changing requirements in areas such as home performance, electrification, resilience, water management, etc. This collection aims to provide valuable insights and guidance to industry experts coping with the dynamic landscape of building standards.

data.title: Cordial introduces 2 new AI agents to automate marketing work in real time, aiming to revolutionize enterprise messaging.
data.description: Cordial recently unveiled two AI agents on Jan. 12, 2026 in San Diego, aimed at handling marketing activations promptly. These agents are intended to streamline tasks such as grounding, governing, executing, and coordinating marketing campaigns in real-time. Cordial, known for its messaging services tailored for enterprise marketing teams, introduced these agents to automate significant marketing processes. This advancement signifies a step forward in the integration of AI technology in marketing strategies, promising increased efficiency and effectiveness in the field.

data.title: ClassDojo expands to district level, used in 95% of schools, improves communication for K-12 leaders.
data.description: ClassDojo, a platform trusted by educators and families in 95% of schools, has expanded its services to include districtwide communications. This move aims to enhance trust, engagement, and messaging within K-12 education systems. As of January 12, 2026, ClassDojo is now offering these features in a bid to assist educational leaders in building solid reputations where it counts the most. The company is based in San Francisco.

data.title: Lung Cancer Research Foundation offers grants with 2026 funding opportunities open for applications. Leading cause of cancer death for men mentioned.
data.description: Applications for grants to fund lung cancer research are now being accepted, as announced by the Lung Cancer Research Foundation (LCRF) on January 12, 2026. The foundation has officially opened their 2026 funding opportunities for submission. It is noted that lung cancer remains the primary cause of cancer-related deaths among men.

data.title: ADNOC CEO Al Jaber named top in 2026 ICIS Top 40 Power Players global ranking for positive impact in the chemical industry.
data.description: In a recent announcement made on January 12, 2026, ICIS released the 2026 ICIS Top 40 Power Players list, which features the top CEOs and senior executives from around the world who are making significant positive contributions to their companies and the chemical industry. This ranking recognizes the leadership and influence of these individuals in driving success and innovation within their organizations. The ICIS Top 40 Power Players list highlights the accomplishments and strategic vision of prominent figures in the industry, showcasing their dedication to excellence and their key roles in shaping the future of the chemical sector.

data.title: StockX's report on Current Culture Index reveals predictions for 2026 after highlighting 200 brands in the secondary market in 2025.
data.description: Today, StockX unveiled its seventh annual Big Facts: Current Culture Index report, offering insights on the leading brands and products in the secondary market in 2025 and forecasting trends for 2026. The report highlights that almost 200 brands were significant in shaping the market last year...

data.title: 10x Genomics partners with Dana-Farber Cancer Institute to study tumor biomarkers for better cancer therapies, aiming to establish a CLIA-certified lab.
data.description: A partnership with Dana-Farber Cancer Institute has been formed to pinpoint biomarkers associated with treatment efficacy for future cancer treatments and to create a clinical reporting structure for precision oncology. Additionally, plans are in place for 10x to set up a CLIA-certified laboratory to facilitate this initiative.

data.title: GitLab appoints Siva Padisetty as CTO, effective Jan 15, 2026. He will lead software engineering, operations, and customer support teams.
data.description: In San Francisco, GitLab Inc. has named Siva Padisetty as the new Chief Technology Officer, taking on the role starting January 15, 2026. Padisetty will be responsible for leading GitLab's software engineering, operations, and customer support divisions to implement the company's technical goals and plans, as well as managing the creation and distribution of GitLab's products. Padisetty replaces Sabrina Farmer, who recently resigned from the position.

data.title: TurfMutt Foundation emphasizes benefits of winter outdoor activities for pets and people, focusing on physical health and social connections.
data.description: In Louisville, Kentucky, on January 12, 2026, the TurfMutt Foundation emphasized the benefits of spending time outdoors during winter. The foundation highlighted that being outside can lead to reduced stress, enhanced mood, improved physical health, and increased social connections for individuals and pets alike. TurfMutt, an advocate for the continuous maintenance and enjoyment of backyards, aims to promote these advantages.

data.title: Global Sensors Market Report 2026-2036 profiles 280+ key players. Includes market forecasts, technology assessments, and competitive intelligence.
data.description: Dublin - A recent report titled "The Global Sensors Market 2026-2036" has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The report provides an in-depth analysis of the global sensor industry, offering precise market forecasts, technology evaluations, and competitive insights on both existing and developing sensor segments. It serves as a valuable resource for investors, technology innovators, and stakeholders within the industry. The report covers the period from 2026 to 2036, highlighting key trends and projections for this timeframe.

data.title: HCLTech partners with Magnum Ice Cream to revamp digital setup - a multi-year IT deal. (Characters: 88)
data.description: In NOIDA, India on January 12, 2026, HCLTech, a renowned technology company (NSE: HCLTECH.NS) (BSE: HCLTECH.BO), announced a new partnership. They will be working with The Magnum Ice Cream Company (TMICC) to create and oversee a cutting-edge IT infrastructure. This multi-year collaboration aims to ensure TMICC is equipped for the future with the latest technology solutions.

South Korea: Ruling Party's Ethics Committee Votes to Expel Kim Byung-ki Over 'Misconduct Allegations'

data.title: EnableComp acquires H/ROI to enhance revenue platform for healthcare providers, capturing hidden revenue from denials.
data.description: EnableComp, based in Franklin, Tennessee, has recently completed a strategic acquisition to enhance its capacity in identifying untapped revenue opportunities for healthcare providers stemming from intricate clinical denials and DRG validation. The acquisition, finalized on January 12, 2026, aims to bolster EnableComp's reputation for effectively addressing complex revenue cycle issues.

data.title: 10x Genomics partners to study blood-based diagnostics for autoimmune disease, identifying single cell immune signatures.
data.description: A recent research initiative seeks to pinpoint unique immune markers within individual cells to gauge disease progression and assess the effectiveness of treatments as part of patient care. 10x Genomics, Inc. (Nasdaq: TXG) based in Pleasanton, California, is spearheading this study. The company, renowned for its expertise in single cell and spatial biology, disclosed its partnership on January 12, 2026. This collaboration highlights a significant step towards enhancing clinical practices through a deeper understanding of immune responses at the cellular level.
